description: A university has an instrument on a NASA satellite. A mission manager must ensure the university gets their data while protecting the data rights of other instruments.

nodes.task_description: Review the data sharing agreements for all payloads on the satellite.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the data rights and access rules for each instrument team.

nodes.task_description: Configure the ground data system to automatically route the data from the university's instrument to their dedicated server.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets up the data routing rules.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the university team can access their data and that they cannot access data from any other instruments.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the access controls are working correctly.
